description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to run a ci job on macos, ubuntu, and windows environments with Node.js 12.x. For each environment, check out the Grin++ Backend, Grin++ UI, and vcpkg repositories, set up the environment, cache vcpkg artifacts, run vcpkg, and use Node.js. Then, run CMake, upload artifacts, and conditionally build the UI for windows, mac, or linux.
